text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week manages to find success in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we successfully navigate the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Looking around your office is bringing back so
many memories.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We talked about so many different things. And
we worked really hard too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When I get back to the dorms, I'm gonna write a
letter to my mom about my training and all my
races...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And about someone really important to me who's
been by my side, watching over me. It's gonna be
a really long letter.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm also gonna write a letter to you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It might end up being a little long... but I hope
you read it to the end.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm gonna stay up all night!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let me just say—thank you so much for the past
three years, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And also... here's to our future together!
